artifact_binding_note: The complete dist-info RECORD file lists a sha256 for EVERY installed file of the package; hashing the whole RECORD therefore binds the full installed artifact content (not a name/version prefix). Upstream PyPI wheel-artifact hashes were unavailable at generation time (no wheel in the local pip cache; the developer machine's Norton SSL inspection blocks some package hosts). A PyPI wheel-hash / fully-hashed lock can be added on a non-Norton environment before full-evaluator qualification.
lock_generation_command: apps/backend/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import importlib.metadata as md, hashlib, pathlib; [print(p, md.version(p), hashlib.sha256((pathlib.Path(md.distribution(p).locate_file(''))/next(iter(pathlib.Path(md.distribution(p).locate_file('')).glob(p.replace('-','_')+'*.dist-info'))).name/'RECORD').read_bytes()).hexdigest()) for p in ['numpy','scipy','pytest','ruff']]"
boundary: synthetic/development-free; no real dataset opened; no validation/OOS access.
